metadata.title: TOMS Shoes Founder on the Success That Nearly Broke Him

core_arcs.arc_summary: Shift from external success to internal fulfillment after personal struggles.
core_arcs.why_it_matters_for_voice: Highlights authentic purpose over external achievement.

core_arcs.arc_summary: Depression led to a quest for healing and core value reconnection.
turning_points: Near loss of self after Tom's sale
core_arcs.why_it_matters_for_voice: Vulnerability and resilience make his voice authentic.

core_arcs.arc_summary: Concern with legacy and the impermanence of work.
turning_points: Hopes work endures after he moves on
Recognition others will do it better
language_used: hope that what you created sticks
somebody's there trying to do it better
core_arcs.why_it_matters_for_voice: Shows deep concern with legacy and impact.

core_arcs.arc_summary: Recognition as a core leadership and cultural driver.
language_used: recognition and how that really drives results
core_arcs.why_it_matters_for_voice: Highlights importance of recognition in leadership.

inner_life_patterns.description: Consistent focus on staying connected to 'why' in life and work.
Belief in authentic connection to overcome mental health struggles.
evidence_quotes: talk about how they're really doing

inner_life_patterns.description: Desire for work to endure and recognition as motivation.
evidence_quotes: hope that what you created sticks

secondary_beliefs: Impact is rooted in inner well-being

recurring_metaphors.meaning: Connection as remedy for mental health.

evidence_quotes: hope that what you created sticks

identity_shift_notes.who_he_was_before: Driven by external success and impact
identity_shift_notes.who_he_is_now: Centered on inner healing and authentic purpose
identity_shift_notes.what_caused_the_shift: Personal battle with depression and loss of purpose

era_read.notes: Reflects a move from external achievement to internal authenticity, aligned with Era C themes.

title: TOMS Shoes Founder on the Success That Nearly Broke Him
